page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.2xlarge is an x86_64 virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs using an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core, along with 479 GB of local SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate average multi-core CPU performance, with a PassMark CPU score of 8286.39 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 4479.0. Memory bandwidth is also average, reaching 391.14 GB/sec for cached reads and approximately 50.63 GB/sec for uncached reads. However, single-core performance is weak, as evidenced by a stress-ng single-core score of 1314.6 and a single-threaded gzip compression rate of 22.77 GB/sec.

This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation and local SSD storage without the premium of GPU accelerators. It is well-suited for database operations, Redis deployments, static web serving, and general-purpose multi-threaded applications. It is less suitable for single-threaded tasks or medium-to-large language model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.2xlarge is an x86_64 virtual server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, 32.0 GB of RAM, and 479 GB of local SSD storage. Operating under a KVM hypervisor with a 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, this instance delivers average multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database throughput, though single-core execution speeds are relatively weak. The balanced resource allocation makes it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for multi-threaded workloads, static web serving, and database applications. With its dedicated CPU allocation and local SSD, it supports stable Redis SET operations and static web serving, though it is not recommended for intensive single-threaded tasks or medium-to-large language model inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.2xlarge is an x86_64 virtual server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 479 GB local SSD storage, delivering average multi-core performance for database and web serving workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.2xlarge features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 479 GB local SSD storage for balanced general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core x86_64 server with balanced memory and local SSD storage for reliable multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 2.5 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory paired with 479 GB of local SSD storage
Average multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and database performance
3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth under a KVM hypervisor
Suited for general-purpose, static web serving, and database workloads
